'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 48''' was the forty-eighth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[November 27]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Yuuzhan Vong]] Incursions
*[[Poggle the Lesser/Legends|Poggle the Lesser]]
*[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]
*[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]
*Bounty Hunters - [[4-LOM/Legends|4-LOM]]
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] - [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Mos Eisley Cantina]]
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] - [[Mos Espa Way/Legends|Mos Espa Way]]
*[[E522 assassin droid/Legends|E522 assassin droid]]
*Qui-Gon's [[Lightsaber/Legends|Lightsaber]]
*[[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Trade Federation Droid Starfighter]]
